ChemSTEP
  • Index

Index

A | C | F | G | H | L | M | N | P | R | S | V | W

A

  • all_jobs_completed() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)
  • apply_beacons_diversity() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)
  • apply_beacons_diversity_maxdiv() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)

C

  • chaining_log (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo attribute)
  • CSAlgo (class in chemstep.algo)
  • CSParams (class in chemstep.parameters)

F

  • fp_lib (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo attribute)

G

  • get_beacons() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)
  • get_todock_list() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)

H

  • hit_pprop (chemstep.parameters.CSParams attribute)

L

  • linking_loop() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)
  • load_all_fps_unused_beacons() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)
  • lookup_dock() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)

M

  • max_beacons (chemstep.parameters.CSParams attribute)
  • max_n_rounds (chemstep.parameters.CSParams attribute)

N

  • n_docked_per_round (chemstep.parameters.CSParams attribute)

P

  • params (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo attribute)
  • print_verbose() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)

R

  • run_local() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)
  • run_one_round() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)
  • run_sge_array() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)
  • run_slurm_array() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)

S

  • screen_novelty() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)
  • seed() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)
  • seed_indices_file (chemstep.parameters.CSParams attribute)
  • seed_scores_file (chemstep.parameters.CSParams attribute)
  • set_score_thresh() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)

V

  • version() (in module chemstep)

W

  • write_smi_file() (chemstep.algo.CSAlgo method)
